title: Thanks for trusting us
message: Der Schutz Ihrer personenbezogenen Daten ist uns wichtig. Wir verarbeiten personenbezogene Daten ausschließlich im Einklang mit den geltenden Datenschutzgesetzen, insbesondere der DSGVO und dem BDSG.

title: Comprehensive Service Announcement
message:
We are excited to announce a comprehensive update to our service offerings and operational guidelines. This announcement contains detailed information that requires careful review and consideration.

Section 1: Service Expansion

As part of our ongoing commitment to providing exceptional manpower solutions, we are expanding our service portfolio to include specialized recruitment services for the healthcare, IT, and engineering sectors. This expansion comes after months of careful market analysis and feedback from our valued clients and partners.

Our new dedicated divisions will focus on:

1. Healthcare Recruitment: We are partnering with leading hospitals, clinics, and healthcare facilities to provide qualified nursing staff, medical technicians, and administrative healthcare professionals. Our rigorous screening process ensures that all candidates meet the highest standards of professional competence and personal integrity.

2. Information Technology Recruitment: The demand for skilled IT professionals continues to grow, and we are responding by building a specialized team of IT recruiters who understand the technical requirements of modern businesses. From software developers to cybersecurity experts, we cover the full spectrum of IT talent needs.

3. Engineering Recruitment: Our engineering division will focus on civil, mechanical, electrical, and industrial engineering positions. We work closely with engineering firms, construction companies, and manufacturing facilities to identify and place top-tier engineering talent.

Section 2: Updated Operational Guidelines

Effective immediately, all candidates must complete our enhanced onboarding process, which includes:

- Comprehensive background verification spanning at least five years of employment history
- Skills assessment tests tailored to the specific role
- Multiple interview rounds with both our recruitment team and the client
- Reference checks with at least three professional references
- Drug screening and medical fitness evaluation where applicable

These enhanced procedures are designed to ensure that we continue to deliver the highest quality candidates to our clients while maintaining our reputation for excellence in the manpower industry.

Section 3: Compliance and Regulatory Updates

We have updated our compliance framework to align with the latest regulatory requirements. All placements will now include:

- Mandatory orientation sessions covering workplace safety, harassment prevention, and company policies
- Regular performance reviews during the first six months of placement
- Ongoing compliance monitoring to ensure continued adherence to all applicable laws and regulations
- Confidentiality agreements and data protection protocols in accordance with GDPR and local privacy laws

Section 4: Client and Candidate Support

We are introducing a new dedicated support team available 24/7 to address any concerns or questions from both clients and placed candidates. Our support team can be reached through multiple channels including phone, email, and our new online portal.

We believe these changes will significantly enhance the quality of our services and the satisfaction of both our clients and candidates. We thank you for your continued trust and partnership as we strive to set new standards in the manpower recruitment industry.

For more information about any of these updates, please contact your account manager or visit our website for detailed documentation and frequently asked questions.
